name: Chrissy Houlahan
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $846,553 for Chrissy Houlahan in U.S. House, PA-06. This dataset currently classifies this as Pro-Israel when total funding is above $0; additional primary-source statement and vote evidence should continue to be expanded.
